name: agenthub-glasses
description: Even Realities G2 companion app for the AgentHub sessions dashboard — read, switch, and voice-drive Claude Code sessions from the glasses.

comments.sdk: The device build additionally needs @evenrealities/even_hub_sdk (+ evenhub-cli / evenhub-simulator). Those live on the Even Hub npm registry and are imported dynamically in src/display/evenhub.ts, so `npm install` and browser dev work without them. Scaffold/verify the SDK glue with the everything-evenhub skills: /quickstart, /template, /sdk-reference, /test-with-simulator.
